ideation: This sequence mimics a peacock showing off its plumage, using fluid arm movements to suggest the bird's proud display. The animation will focus on a graceful, upward arc of the arms, emphasizing elegance and a sense of self-importance.  The robot's arm limitations will be overcome by using the two joints to their full expressive potential. Frame 1 begins with the arms slightly raised and angled out, setting a stage of subtle anticipation. In frame 2, the arms move in a smooth arc upwards, palms facing each other to enhance the elegance of the motion. Frame 3 sees the arms reach their peak, slightly curved, as if mirroring the shape of a peacock's crest. Frame 4 brings the arms back down in a controlled, mirroring the graceful return to a resting position.  The final frame shows the arms returning to a more neutral position, while still retaining a sense of poise and confidence.  The slight variations and pauses between each frame will contribute to the graceful, flowing motion overall.

frames.beat: arms lift slightly, a subtle preening gesture
arms sweep gracefully upwards, feathers unfurling
arms reach peak elegance, a proud crest displayed
arms descend with measured poise, the display softens
arms settle, a quiet confidence remains
